data.name: Wife Life : Secret
data.detailed_description:
Shape the life of a housewife who’s ready to be reshaped… by you.

She has a husband. A routine. A quiet life.
But behind every chore, every glance, every late night delivery... is a choice.
And it’s you who decides what kind of woman she becomes.

Will you keep her loyal? devoted to her duties and her marriage?
Or will temptation slowly take control, leading her into secret desires and risky pleasures?

Wife Life’s: Secret is a time-based adult visual novel where your decisions shape everything:
from relationships, tasks, and scenes, to how close she comes to crossing the line — or getting caught.

✦ Features:

  • 4 Different ending

  •  Flirt, seduce, and build connections with multiple characters

  •  Unlock scenes and progress based on choices and task completion

  •  Suspicion system: every choice has consequences

  •  Interactive UI, tasks, and messaging

  •  Stylish 2D art 

Whether she’s a perfect wife… or someone else's secret, it’s all up to you!.

data.short_description: Shape the story of a happy wife in a happy marriage, your choices matter!, so choose wisely!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or newer
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c
